scanner-enabled.description: Controls whether the repository scanning feature is available

domain-model-v2.description: Enables the new domain model editor experience

landscape-lint-strict.description: Enables strict mode for landscape linting (warning-level findings become errors)

ai-insights-enabled.description: Enables AI-powered insights in FOE scan reports

governance-v2.description: Enables the next-generation governance dashboard with enhanced visualizations

max-concurrent-scans.description: Maximum number of concurrent scan jobs allowed

scan.runtime.description: Agent runtime for FOE scans. 'opencode' uses the Docker container with OpenCode CLI. 'langgraph' uses LangGraph StateGraph with direct LLM API calls.

chat.runtime.description: Agent runtime for interactive chat. 'opencode' proxies to the OpenCode HTTP server. 'langgraph' uses a LangGraph ReAct agent graph.

landscape-layout-v2.description: Enables v2 zoned landscape layout with trunk routing and user-facing/system-supporting tiering
